mapper.select: select count(thrl.id) FROM t_hos_revisit_log thrl left join t_hos_revisit thr on thrl.hos_revisit_id=thr.id left join t_order o on thr.order_num = o.order_num left join t_hos_sick ths on thrl.sick_id=ths.id left join t_doctor_user tdu on thrl.doctor_user_id=tdu.id left join t_hospital th on tdu.hospital_id=th.id

if.test: startTime != null and startTime != '' and endTime != null and endTime != ''
